change: Added HIPENGINE_GGUF_T16_DS4_PREFILL=1 guarded runtime route that packs compact BF16 MoE activations to DS4 Q8_1 and feeds the resident gguf_q4_k_t16_v1 WMMA32 selected dual prefill kernel.

checks.hot_path_torch_or_llamacpp_import_grep: No matches for import torch or llama.cpp in hipengine/runtime/qwen35_gguf_runner.py

commands.default_verify: cd /home/lhl/hipEngine-gguf-tuning && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt PYTHONPATH=. /home/lhl/mambaforge/envs/therock/bin/python3.12 scripts/qwen35_readme_sweep.py --engine gguf --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_S.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_s --workloads 512/128 4K/128 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-gguf-tuning-gpu1-acceptance.json
commands.guard: cd /home/lhl/hipEngine-gguf-tuning && HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt python3 -m pytest tests/test_gguf_t16_repack.py tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_t16_selected_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_q6_k_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_gemv_decode_dispatch.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_compact_moe_gemv_routing.py -q
commands.optin_probe: cd /home/lhl/hipEngine-gguf-tuning && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_T16_DS4_PREFILL=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt PYTHONPATH=. /home/lhl/mambaforge/envs/therock/bin/python3.12 scripts/qwen35_readme_sweep.py --engine gguf --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_S.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_s --workloads 512/128 4K/128 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-gguf-tuning-gpu1-t16-ds4-acceptance.json

hardware: GPU1 gfx1100 / AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX class, TheRock HIP 7.13
notes: The guarded path is useful evidence that resident-T16 DS4 MMQ improves full-model prefill, but it is not exact enough for promotion because generated final token IDs changed from default 220/570 to 3241/1510.
The extra DS4 activation scratch is allocated only when HIPENGINE_GGUF_T16_DS4_PREFILL=1, so the default verify kept tracked peak at 21.334842 GiB.
128K/128 final promotion was not run because the opt-in path failed the primary correctness/prompt verifier first.
promotion_status: blocked: opt-in resident-T16 DS4 prefill changes generated final token IDs versus the default gate
